title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Ratna Sagar Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ratna Sagar Holdings Services:
Ratna Sagar Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar Holdings Services!
